word: G4122 - πλεονεκτέω - pleonektéō - pleh-on-cek-teh'-o - Get an advantage

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Get an advantage
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
1. to have more, or a greater part or share
2. to gain or take advantage of another, to overreach
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G4123; to be covetous, that is, (by implication) to over reach: - get an advantage, defraud, make a gain.
